<!--
Fill in each section below. Keep it concise but concrete — a reviewer
should not need to open the diff to understand what changed and why.
-->

## Summary
<!-- One-sentence description of what this PR does. -->

## Problem / Context
<!-- Why is this change needed? What did the previous state fail to do? -->

## Changes Implemented
<!-- Bullet list of concrete changes. One bullet per meaningful edit. Reference files or modules touched. -->
-
-
-

## Technical Approach
<!-- How does this work? Highlight the key design decision and one alternative you rejected (and why). -->

## API Changes
<!-- List new / modified endpoints with method + path, or "None". -->

## Database Changes
<!-- New collections, fields, indexes, or migrations, or "None". -->

## Testing Done
<!-- Manual test steps performed, any automated tests added, edge cases considered. -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Screenshots
<!-- For UI PRs only. Delete this section otherwise. -->

## Notes for Reviewer
<!-- Anything you're uncertain about, deferred follow-ups, or areas where feedback would be most valuable. -->
